description_long: This compact projector features a rectangular body with a predominantly white and light gray exterior, accented by a large, circular black lens on the front face. The front panel includes a prominent circular power button with a blue outline and a small indicator light, suggesting user-friendly operation. The sides of the device display a subtle diagonal textured pattern, likely for grip and aesthetic appeal, with one side housing a small port or sensor. The rear panel is plain with a single small black dot, possibly a reset button or indicator, and faint outlines of compartment covers. The top surface appears to have a single button or port, possibly for additional controls or connectivity. The overall design is minimalistic and modern, suitable for portable use in urban environments.
description: A compact, white and gray projector with a large black lens, textured sides, and a minimalistic control panel featuring a blue-outlined power button.
description_view_0: Side view showing the textured gray surface with no visible controls or ports, and the protruding black lens edge.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the large black lens, blue-outlined power button, and a small indicator light on a smooth white face.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with textured gray surface, featuring a small port or sensor and the lens protruding from the front.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying a plain light gray surface with a small black dot and faint outlines of compartment covers.
attribute_lens_type: fixed; large circular lens with no visible adjustment rings
attribute_control_panel_design: Front panel with a single large circular power button outlined in blue, a small indicator light, and no visible dials or touch controls.
